channel.title: Claude Code Changelog
channel.description: Audio summaries of Claude Code releases - the important features, fixes, and improvements distilled into short podcast episodes.
channel.itunes:author: Laclaw
channel.itunes:summary: Audio summaries of Claude Code releases - the important features, fixes, and improvements distilled into short podcast episodes.

item.title: v2.1.83 - Transcript Search, Credential Scrubbing, Performance Boost
item.itunes:summary: Audio summary of Claude Code 2.1.83 release
item.description:
Claude Code v2.1.83 - March 25, 2026 (76 changes)

Full changelog | Official docs

New Features

  • Transcript search - Press / in transcript mode (Ctrl+O) to search, n/N to jump between matches
  • Credential scrubbing - CLAUDE_CODE_SUBPROCESS_ENV_SCRUB=1 strips API keys from subprocesses (bash, hooks, MCP servers)
  • CwdChanged/FileChanged hooks - Reactive environment management (e.g., direnv auto-loading)
  • sandbox.failIfUnavailable - Exit with error if sandbox can't start instead of running unsandboxed
  • Agent initialPrompt - Agents can auto-submit a first turn via frontmatter
  • Image chips - Pasted images get [Image #N] labels at cursor for positional reference
  • Plugin configuration - Plugins can prompt for config at enable time, sensitive values stored in keychain

Performance

  • --bare -p is ~14% faster to first API call
  • --resume uses less memory on large sessions
  • Plugins load from disk cache instead of re-fetching
  • Non-streaming fallback cap: 21k to 64k tokens, timeout 120s to 300s
  • Startup ~4s faster (voice module + MCP config fetch fixes)

Notable Fixes

  • Mac sleep prevention (caffeinate not terminating) - fixed
  • Subagents invisible after context compaction causing duplicates - fixed
  • rg | wc -l hanging in sandbox on Linux - fixed
  • Memory leak in remote sessions (tool IDs accumulating) - fixed
  • MCP tool calls hanging on SSE connection drop - fixed
  • Scrollback jumping when thinking starts/stops - fixed
  • Tool result files ignoring cleanupPeriodDays - fixed

Other

  • /status works mid-response now
  • Ctrl+L forces full screen redraw
  • WebFetch identifies as Claude-User for robots.txt
  • MEMORY.md index truncates at 25KB/200 lines
  • "Stop all agents" keybinding: Ctrl+F to Ctrl+X Ctrl+K
  • [VSCode] "Not responding" spinner after 60s, new rewind picker

item.title: v2.1.81 - Bare Mode for CI, Phone Permission Relay
item.itunes:summary: Audio summary of Claude Code 2.1.81 release
item.description:
Claude Code v2.1.81 - March 20, 2026

Full changelog | Official docs

New Features

  • Bare mode - --bare flag for scripted -p calls skips hooks, LSP, plugin sync, skill walks. Great for CI/automation.
  • Channels permission relay - Channel servers can forward tool approval prompts to your phone for remote approval.

Notable Fixes

  • Concurrent session auth - multiple sessions no longer force repeated re-auth when one refreshes OAuth
  • Voice mode no longer swallows retry failures with misleading "check your network" message
  • Voice audio recovers when server silently drops WebSocket
  • Background agent race condition - task output hanging between polling intervals
  • Worktree session resume now switches back to the worktree automatically

Improvements

  • MCP tool calls collapse into single "Queried server" line (expand with Ctrl+O)
  • Claude suggests ! bash mode when you need interactive commands
  • Ref-tracked plugins re-clone on load for freshness
  • MCP OAuth supports CIMD for servers without Dynamic Client Registration
  • Plan mode hides "clear context" by default
  • Line-by-line streaming disabled on Windows/WSL due to rendering issues

item.title: v2.1.80 - Rate Limit Visibility, Channels Preview, Effort Frontmatter
item.itunes:summary: Audio summary of Claude Code 2.1.80 release
item.description:
Claude Code v2.1.80 - March 19, 2026

Full changelog | Official docs

New Features

  • Rate limit visibility - Status line scripts get rate_limits field showing 5-hour and 7-day usage windows with percentages and reset times
  • Channels (research preview) - MCP servers can push messages into your session (Slack, GitHub notifications, etc.)
  • Settings-based plugins - Declare plugin entries inline in settings.json
  • Effort frontmatter - Skills/slash commands can override model effort level per invocation
  • Plugin tips now detect CLI tool usage, not just file patterns

Notable Fixes

  • Resume dropping parallel tool results - Sessions with parallel tool calls now restore correctly instead of showing "Tool result missing" placeholders (significant data loss bug)
  • Voice mode WebSocket failures from Cloudflare bot detection - fixed
  • 400 errors with fine-grained tool streaming on proxies/Bedrock/Vertex - fixed
  • Managed settings not applied at startup from cached remote-settings.json - fixed

Improvements

  • File autocomplete more responsive in large repos
  • /effort shows what "auto" currently resolves to
  • Startup memory reduced ~80MB on 250k-file repos
  • Plugin installation simplified to single command
